sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36033" key="e)nruso/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνρῡσόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n36033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become wrinkled,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνερρυσωμένος</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rugose,</tr_> Megesap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:24:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.24.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
